name: construction contractors managing 5–10 projects simultaneously tool
description: For construction contractors processing 5–10 projects simultaneously, inconsistent reporting causes client dissatisfaction. We automate progress reporting instead of manual reporting through spreadsheets and emails.
problem_solved: Inconsistent reporting on project progress leads to client dissatisfaction and potential penalties.
features: manual data entry for job site updates
